about.title: Corporate
about.intro: Ing - Luli was established in 1994 as a trading company for locally produced and imported building materials. The company later expanded into manufacturing and became a regional producer with certified product systems.

sections.heading: Foundation and Early Production
sections.body: In 1998, the company began implementing a production-focused strategy for construction adhesives and tile-setting compounds. The first products were introduced in July 1999, reaching around 10 tons per day.

sections.heading: Growth and Market Expansion
sections.body: From 2000 onward, sales expanded in Kosovo while domestic demand continued to grow. By 2005, products met EN 12004 requirements certified by the Accredited Institute ZAG - Ljubljana, opening export opportunities to Germany and Switzerland.

sections.heading: Technology and Capacity Investments
sections.body: To support growing demand, a second factory was built in 2009, focused on thermo-insulation facade materials. In 2011, the company obtained ETAG 004 system certificates from ZAG - Ljubljana and fulfilled continuous monitoring criteria.

sections.heading: Current Position and Direction
sections.body: Today, Ing - Luli is present in Macedonia and international markets including Kosovo, Germany, Switzerland, Austria, and France. The ongoing mission is to expand production capacity, invest in modern technology, and deliver practical solutions across all building stages.

qualityPolicy.title: Quality Policy
qualityPolicy.intro: Quality is built on certified systems, controlled production, and continuous compliance with European standards.
points: Maintain standardized production processes aligned with European norms.
Sustain product certification under EN 12004 and ETAG 004 requirements.
Support continuous monitoring and compliance checks by accredited institutions.
Invest in modern technology, qualified staff, and stable quality controls.
Provide reliable technical support and consistent service to regional and export markets.
